message: Section 1.4 - Analytical determination for nanoforms is incomplete. Each entry under Analytical determination for nanoforms must be complete and contain at least the following information:- At least one 'Parameter' must be indicated- At least one 'Analysis type' must be selected- An attachment with the analytical report must be provided under 'Attached methods/results' or a valid reason for not providing the information must be indicated. You must make a selection in the field 'Rationale for no results' and insert an explanation in the 'Justification' field, clearly stating the reasons for not providing the expected informationNote that the 'Parameter' and 'Analysis type' fields are multi-select lists and you can indicate several determination parameters and analysis types with the same entry, if applicable. If you select 'other:' in any of the picklist fields, the below text field must be filled in.

Section 1.4 is incomplete. No identification method nor results have been provided for the substance. You must create at least one record in section 1.4, and under the 'Analytical determination' heading provide a new entry where the field 'Purpose of analysis' is set to 'identification' or 'identification and quantification'. In the same entry, you must indicate the appropriate 'Analysis type' and attach a document containing the methods and results of the analysis that were used for identifying the substance.
An indication of the optical activity of the substance should be provided in section 1.4 in the field 'Optical activity'.
